scenes.description: Koseki Bijou and Kosei Hajime perform 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class'.
Bijou completes the stage, receives a coin from Hajime, and transitions to the next world.
Bijou arrives at a new stage and calculates how many coins she needs left.
Amane Kanata and La+ Darknesss appear to challenge Bijou for the next coin in a 'Zombie Elimination' battle.
Bijou, Kanata, and La+ perform 'Make It Out Alive'.

subtitles.original: うっざー！
subtitles.english: So annoying!

subtitles.original:
因幡ウサギ 可愛げもないのに
新参の徒どもは ホイホイホイ
subtitles.english:
Inaba rabbits, not even cute,
yet the newcomers flock to them like flies.

subtitles.original:
再生百万回 もれなく愚民なんて
どういうことなのよ
subtitles.english:
A million views, and they're all idiots?
What's that about?

subtitles.original:
どちらかって言うなら サーバー管理も
お疲れさんってとこね
subtitles.english:
If anything, I should say
good job on the server management.

subtitles.original:
「わかった！ アタイがあまりにも天才だから
嫉妬してるんでしょ♪」
subtitles.english:
"I get it! You're just jealous
because I'm such a genius, right?♪"

subtitles.original:
「ほんと、しょうがないわね！
せっかくお近づきになれたんだから アタイの天才の秘訣を…」
subtitles.english:
"Seriously, I have no choice!
Since we've gotten close, I'll let you in on the secret of my genius..."

subtitles.original: 「ちょっとだけ教えてあげてもいいわよ！」
subtitles.english: "I could teach you just a little bit!"

subtitles.original: あたいのあたいのあたいのあたいの...
subtitles.english: I am, I am, I am, I am...

subtitles.original: 英知を集めて集めて集めて集めて束ねても
subtitles.english: Even if you gather, gather, gather all the wisdom together...

subtitles.original: あたいのあたいの丈夫な頭に
subtitles.english: To my, my... strong head,

subtitles.original: 集まれ集まれ集まれ集まれ叶わない
subtitles.english: Gather, gather, gather... it's no match.

subtitles.original: あめちゃんあめちゃんあめちゃんあめちゃん食べたら
subtitles.english: If I eat, eat, eat, eat... candy,

subtitles.original: あの子のあの子のあの子のあの子の手をひねる
subtitles.english: I'll twist that kid's hand like it's easy as pie.

subtitles.original: あたいはあたいはあたいはあたいは完璧
subtitles.english: I am, I am, I am, I am... perfect.

subtitles.original: いわゆるいわゆるいわゆるいわゆるパーフェクト
subtitles.english: So to speak, I am... perfect.

subtitles.original: ひゃ～くおくじゅうまんバッチリ！
subtitles.english: Ten billion, perfectly!

subtitles.original: 山落ち意味など無いわ
subtitles.english: There's no need for a climax or a point.

subtitles.original: キャラクター立てばいいのよ
subtitles.english: As long as the character is established.

subtitles.original: 元気があれば何でも
subtitles.english: If you have energy, you can do anything.
One, two, nine!

subtitles.original: ぐるぐる時計の針
subtitles.english: Round and round, the clock hands,

subtitles.original: ぐるぐる頭まわる
subtitles.english: Round and round, my head spins.

subtitles.original: だってつぶら目玉
subtitles.english: Because despite my round eyes,

subtitles.original: 二つしかないのに
subtitles.english: I only have two,

subtitles.original: 三本の針なんてちんぷんかんぷん
subtitles.english: So three clock hands are just gibberish to me.

subtitles.original: 次々問題出る
subtitles.english: Problems come out one after another,

subtitles.original: まだまだ授業続く
subtitles.english: The class continues on and on.

subtitles.original:
凍る部屋の中 ひやりとした温度も時間も
気にせずゆっくりしていってね！
subtitles.english:
In the freezing room, don't worry about the chilly
temperature or time, and just take it easy!

subtitles.original: バーカ、バーカ！
subtitles.english: Stupid, stupid!

subtitles.original: もうバカでいいわよ知らない！
subtitles.english: Fine, call me stupid! I don't care!

subtitles.original:
おー、あたいのダンスについてこれるなんて、
なかなかやるな！
subtitles.english:
Oh, keeping up with my dance?
You're pretty good!

subtitles.original: はー！ よし、コインをよこせ！
subtitles.english: Hah! Alright, hand over the coin!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！ アイ・ガット・ア・コイン！
subtitles.english: Yay! I got a coin!

subtitles.original:
じゃ、はじめ！ サンキュー・フォー・ダンシング・ウィズ・ミー！
めっちゃ楽しかった！
subtitles.english:
Then, Hajime! Thank you for dancing with me!
It was so much fun!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ楽しかった！ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: It was so much fun! Thank you!

subtitles.original:
テイク・ケア！ じゃ、アイ・マスト・ゴー！
うわ、オッケー！
subtitles.english:
Take care! Then, I must go!
Whoa, okay!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ふー、あー...
subtitles.english: Phew, ah...

subtitles.original: おー、アイム・ヒア・オールレディ。オッケー、アイ・シー。
subtitles.english: Oh, I'm here already. Okay, I see.

subtitles.original:
ワオ、ワッツ・ネクスト・ゼン？ ザ・レスト・イズ...
アイ・カウント、ワン、ツー。ツー・チャレンジズ・レフト、アイ・シンク。フォー・ツー・コインズ。
subtitles.english:
Wow, what's next then? The rest is...
I count, one, two. Two challenges left, I think. For two coins.

subtitles.original: 待っていたぞ、ビブー！
subtitles.english: We've been waiting for you, Biboo!

subtitles.original: Amane Kanata / La+ Darknesss Joins the Battle!
subtitles.english: Amane Kanata / La+ Darknesss Joins the Battle!

subtitles.original:
え、かなた先輩？ ラプラス？
ホワット・アー・ユー・ドゥーイング・ヒア？
subtitles.english:
Eh, Kanata-senpai? La+?
What are you doing here?

subtitles.original: これが欲しければ、我々と勝負だ！
subtitles.english: If you want this, then battle us!

subtitles.original: オー、マイ・コイン！
subtitles.english: Oh, my coin!

subtitles.original: 勝負だ！ 迫り来るゾンビを全部倒すことができるかな？
subtitles.english:
It's a challenge! I wonder if you can
defeat all the approaching zombies?

subtitles.original: オー、ウェル、じゃ、私は... 死なない！
subtitles.english: Oh well, then, I... won't die!

subtitles.original: Run away, run away, run away now
subtitles.english: Run away, run away, run away now

subtitles.original: Time to put the weapons down
subtitles.english: Time to put the weapons down

subtitles.original: Nowhere to go, nowhere to go, nowhere
subtitles.english: Nowhere to go, nowhere to go, nowhere

subtitles.original: No road is left to run
subtitles.english: No road is left to run

subtitles.original: I was born, I was born with horns
subtitles.english: I was born, I was born with horns

subtitles.original: Demons come to shake me up
subtitles.english: Demons come to shake me up

subtitles.original: Bring it on, bring it on, bring it on
subtitles.english: Bring it on, bring it on, bring it on

subtitles.original: 'Cause we haven't had enough
subtitles.english: 'Cause we haven't had enough

subtitles.original: Don't give up the fight
subtitles.english: Don't give up the fight

subtitles.original: Make it out alive
subtitles.english: Make it out alive

subtitles.original: Step inside the final war
subtitles.english: Step inside the final war

subtitles.original: Make it out alive
subtitles.english: Make it out alive

subtitles.original: Don't give up the fight
subtitles.english: Don't give up the fight

subtitles.original: Make it out alive
subtitles.english: Make it out alive

subtitles.original: It's time I won't let you down
subtitles.english: It's time I won't let you down

subtitles.original: We're gonna make it out alive now
subtitles.english: We're gonna make it out alive now
